heading: Rules for application of assessable penalties
label: 6671 Rules for application of assessable penalties
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Penalty assessed as tax
children.label: a Penalty assessed as tax
children.text: The penalties and liabilities provided by this subchapter shall be paid upon notice and demand by the Secretary, and shall be assessed and collected in the same manner as taxes. Except as otherwise provided, any reference in this title to “tax” imposed by this title shall be deemed also to refer to the penalties and liabilities provided by this subchapter.

children.heading: Person defined
children.label: b Person defined
children.text: The term “person”, as used in this subchapter, includes an officer or employee of a corporation, or a member or employee of a partnership, who as such officer, employee, or member is under a duty to perform the act in respect of which the violation occurs.
